notes: Gas resources referenced by blocks but never modeled as first-class entries. Neither gas has a published infobox: the Oxygen wiki page is prose-only (no mass/volume/stackable), and Hydrogen has no dedicated wiki page at all — its existence is implied through the O2/H2 Generator outputs and the Hydrogen Tank / Hydrogen Thruster consumer pages. Entries here exist primarily so the rest of the repo can reference `hydrogen` and `oxygen` by id instead of raw strings. Flow rates (per-second/unit) are captured on the consuming/producing blocks, not here. The wiki notes that environmental pressurization and airtight rooms are not yet implemented in the current alpha — so the oxygen mechanic is partially in place (suit oxygen, refill blocks) but not complete.

resources.description: Gas produced by electrolysing ice (and eventually water) in an O2/H2 Generator. Consumed by Hydrogen Thrusters for propulsion and by the Jetpack Fuel Tank consumable. Stored in Hydrogen Tanks.
dataGaps: wiki (no dedicated wiki page exists — documented only via its producers/consumers)
unit-per-time for production and consumption rates is not consistently published on consumer/producer pages

resources.description: Gas required by the player's suit for survival in space and on airless celestial bodies. Produced by electrolysing ice (and eventually water) in an O2/H2 Generator. Consumed by the player suit when outside breathable atmosphere. Suit oxygen can be topped up via the Oxygen Recharge consumable, or by holding F at an O2/H2 Generator, Survival Kit, Medical Room, or Cockpit. Environmental pressurization and airtight rooms are not yet implemented in the current alpha.
dataGaps: wiki page is prose-only, no infobox with resource properties
environmental pressurization not yet implemented in the current alpha
